'''thalacha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pygmoid|pygmoid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-l-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pygmoid|pygmoid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| thalacha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thælæchæth || thælæchæj || thælæchæsh || thælæchæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thalalachath || thalalachaj || thalalachash || thalalacha
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thalachath || thalachaj || thalachash || thalacha
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thalafchafth || thalafchafj || thalafchafsh || thalafchaf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || thalachatha || thalachaja || thalachasha || thalachaka
|-
| [[Patient]] || thalachath || thalachaj || thalachash || thalacha
|-
| [[Possessive]] || thalachathal || thalachajal || thalachashal || thalachakal
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || thalachaathatha || thalachaajaja || thalachaashasha || thalachaaka
|-
| [[Dative]] || thalachathan || thalachajan || thalachashan || thalachakan
|-
| [[Speaker]] || thalachathaoro || thalachajaoro || thalachashaoro || thalachakaoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
